sentences.target: Der Protest ist heute sehr groß.

translations.de: Der Protest ist heute sehr groß.
translations.en: The protest is very large today.
translations.es: La protesta de hoy es muy grande.
translations.fr: Il y a une grosse manifestation aujourd'hui.
translations.pt: O protesto de hoje é muito grande.
translations.vi: Cuộc biểu tình hôm nay rất đông.
translations.nl: Vandaag is het protest erg groot.
translations.hi: आज विरोध प्रदर्शन बहुत बड़ा है.
translations.el: Η σημερινή διαδήλωση είναι πολύ μεγάλη.
translations.nb: Protesten i dag er veldig stor.
translations.sv: Protesten i dag är väldigt stor.
translations.ro: Protestul de azi este foarte mare.
translations.da: Protesten i dag er meget stor.
translations.ja: 今日は抗議デモがとても大きいです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular, determinates the subject noun 'Protest'.
Common noun; head of the subject NP that the copula links to the predicate adjective.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present of 'sein', linking subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb; specifies the time of the state.
Degree adverb; intensifies the adjective 'groß'.
Predicative adjective; complement of the copula 'ist' describing the subject.

sentences.target: Ich verstehe den Protest der Nachbarn.

translations.de: Ich verstehe den Protest der Nachbarn.
translations.es: Entiendo la protesta de los vecinos.
translations.fr: Je comprends la protestation des voisins.
translations.pt: Eu entendo o protesto dos vizinhos.
translations.he: אני מבין את המחאה של השכנים.
translations.vi: Tôi hiểu sự phản đối của hàng xóm.
translations.nl: Ik begrijp het protest van de buren.
translations.hi: मैं पड़ोसियों के विरोध को समझता हूँ.
translations.ja: 近所の人たちの抗議を理解しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative, subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb; 1st person singular present, transitive and selecting a direct object.
Definite article; accusative masculine singular marking 'Protest' as direct object.
Common noun; head of the accusative NP functioning as direct object of 'verstehe'.
Definite article; genitive plural introducing the possessor NP attached to 'Protest'.
Common noun; genitive plural, complements 'Protest' as a genitive attribute ('of the neighbors').

sentences.target: Vor der Schule gibt es Protest.

translations.de: Vor der Schule gibt es Protest.
translations.en: There is a protest in front of the school.
translations.es: Hay una protesta frente a la escuela.
translations.fr: Il y a une manifestation devant l'école.
translations.it: C'è una protesta davanti alla scuola.
translations.pt: Há um protesto em frente à escola.
translations.vi: Có cuộc biểu tình trước cổng trường.
translations.nl: Er is een protest voor de school.
translations.hi: स्कूल के सामने प्रदर्शन हो रहा है.
translations.nb: Det er en protest foran skolen.
translations.sv: Det är en protest utanför skolan.
translations.ro: Este un protest în fața școlii.
translations.da: Der er en protest foran skolen.
translations.ja: 学校の前で抗議デモがあります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; governs dative, heads a locative PP.
Definite article; dative feminine singular marking the object of the preposition.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vor' (dative).
Finite lexical verb; 3rd person singular present forming the existential construction 'es gibt'.
Personal/expletive pronoun; dummy subject in the existential 'es gibt'.
Common noun; accusative direct object of 'gibt' in the 'es gibt' construction.

sentences.target: Wir planen morgen einen Protest vor dem Rathaus.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈplaːnən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nən pʁoˈtɛst foːɐ̯ deːm ˈʁaːtˌhaʊ̯s/

translations.de: Wir planen morgen einen Protest vor dem Rathaus.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈplaːnən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nən pʁoˈtɛst foːɐ̯ deːm ˈʁaːtˌhaʊ̯s/
translations.en: We're planning a protest in front of the town hall tomorrow.
translations.es: Estamos planeando una protesta frente al ayuntamiento para mañana.
translations.fr: Nous prévoyons une manifestation devant la mairie pour demain.
translations.it: Stiamo organizzando una protesta davanti al municipio per domani.
translations.ko: 우리는 내일 시청 앞에서 시위를 계획하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们计划明天在市政厅前举行抗议。
translations.yue: 我哋計劃聽日喺市政府門口搞示威。
translations.ru: Мы планируем завтра провести протест у мэрии.
translations.pt: Estamos planejando um protesto em frente à prefeitura para amanhã.
translations.he: אנחנו מתכננים מחר מחאה מול העירייה.
translations.tr: Yarın belediye binasının önünde bir protesto planlıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang lên kế hoạch tổ chức một cuộc biểu tình trước tòa thị chính vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: نحن نخطط لاحتجاج أمام دار البلدية غدًا.
translations.nl: We plannen morgen een protest voor het stadhuis.
translations.uk: Ми плануємо завтра протест біля мерії.
translations.hu: Holnapra tüntetést tervezünk a városháza elé.
translations.hi: हम कल टाउन हॉल के सामने एक प्रदर्शन की योजना बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σχεδιάζουμε για αύριο μια διαδήλωση μπροστά στο δημαρχείο.
translations.nb: Vi planlegger en protest foran rådhuset i morgen.
translations.id: Kami merencanakan aksi protes di depan balai kota besok.
translations.sv: Vi planerar en protest utanför stadshuset i morgon.
translations.ro: Plănuim pentru mâine un protest în fața primăriei.
translations.cs: Plánujeme na zítra protest před radnicí.
translations.da: Vi planlægger en protest foran rådhuset i morgen.
translations.ja: 私たちは明日、市役所の前で抗議デモを計画しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative, subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb; 1st person plural present, takes a direct object.
Temporal adverb; specifies when the planning or planned event occurs.
Indefinite article; accusative masculine singular marking 'Protest' as direct object.
Common noun; head of the accusative NP functioning as direct object of 'planen'.
Preposition; governs dative, introduces a locative PP modifying the planned event.
Definite article; dative singular neuter marking the object of 'vor'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'vor' (dative), specifies location.
